name: Property manager reports installer no-show with incomplete account details
description: A busy property manager says the technician never arrived for a scheduled install, provides only a unit number and partial contact info at first, and wants rapid follow-up. The scenario tests clarification, handling fragmented information, and escalation or callback setup if the issue cannot be fully resolved immediately.
expectedMilestones: Request missing identifying details needed to locate the appointment
Handle fragmented or partial information without losing context
Determine that immediate resolution is not possible with available details
Offer callback or escalation pathway with clear next steps
Capture the best callback contact and urgency
